sizing_rule.note: Kelly criterion with conditional probability. Apply f=0.325 (32.5% of capital) after wins with 55% win probability; apply reduced fraction after losses with 45% win probability. Payoff ratio 2:1. Scales position size based on trade momentum.

source_rule_text: Adjust position sizing based on the outcome of the previous trade using Kelly formula with conditional probability distribution - size larger after wins (55% win probability) and smaller after losses (45% loss probability).
